name_en: M81520!Embossed Nude Pink!Made of top-grain cowhide!Women's coin purse card holder. Compact yet practical, this colorful envelope-style coin purse is the perfect companion for the modern woman's urban life. Small size, easily fits into bags or even pockets. Dimensions: 11×8cm.
